context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements inline video with iOS-compatible autoplay attributes, dual video sources in the right order, CDN image URL construction with proper parameters, retina-correct image sizing, hero image prioritization attributes, and modern image format guidance.

checklist.name: playsInline attribute
checklist.description: The video element includes the playsInline attribute (or playsInline={true} in JSX)

checklist.name: muted attribute
checklist.description: The video element includes the muted attribute (or muted={true} in JSX)

checklist.name: preload metadata
checklist.description: The video element has preload='metadata' (not 'auto' or 'none')

checklist.name: WebM source first
checklist.description: The video element includes both a WebM source and an MP4 source, with the WebM <source> listed before the MP4 <source>

checklist.name: WebM URL derivation
checklist.description: The WebM URL is derived from the MP4 src by replacing '.mp4' with '.webm' (i.e., src.replace('.mp4', '.webm') or equivalent)

checklist.name: Video fallback text
checklist.description: The video element contains a text fallback (inside <video> tags) that includes a download link to the MP4 src

checklist.name: CDN URL quality and format auto
checklist.description: buildImageUrl constructs a URL containing both q_auto (or quality=auto) and f_auto (or format=auto) parameters

checklist.name: CDN c_fill crop mode
checklist.description: buildImageUrl constructs a URL containing c_fill as the crop/fit mode

checklist.name: fetchpriority high on hero
checklist.description: HeroImage.jsx includes fetchpriority='high' (or fetchPriority='high' in JSX) on the img element

checklist.name: loading eager on hero
checklist.description: HeroImage.jsx includes loading='eager' on the img element

checklist.name: 2x retina sizing guidance
checklist.description: MEDIA_GUIDE.md states that images should be served at 2x the rendered/CSS size for retina screens (e.g., a 400px container needs an 800px image), and explicitly warns against requesting unnecessarily larger sizes

checklist.name: WebP/AVIF format guidance
checklist.description: MEDIA_GUIDE.md recommends WebP or AVIF as the image format and mentions providing a JPEG fallback (via <picture> element or CDN content negotiation)

checklist.name: iOS autoplay guidance
checklist.description: MEDIA_GUIDE.md explains that both playsInline and muted are required for autoplay on iOS Safari
